title: The Song That Calls You Home
original_title: The Song That Calls You Home
overview: A personal, scientific, mystical exploration of Amazonian curanderismo, focus on Ayahuasca and Master Plants, their healing and visionary properties and risks, along with the Shipibo people and their songs.
